description: Create a 'Web' marketing campaign named 'Industrial Sensor Launch 2026' with an 'Active' status, a budget of 15000, expected revenue of 75000, and an end date in December 2026. Configure three Tracker URLs for this campaign: 'LinkedIn Promo' (https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/linkedin), 'Trade Show Kiosk' (https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/kiosk), and 'Partner Email' (https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/partner).
